title: Neuronal wiring diagram of an adult brain
abstract: The FlyWire connectome: a complete map of 139,255 neurons and approximately 50 million chemical synapses in an adult Drosophila brain, combining automated AI segmentation with community proofreading to produce the first whole-brain wiring diagram of an adult animal.
notes: Murthy co-senior author. Cross-listed with Dorkenwald, Bock, Seung, Jefferis.
